title: Socket.io: real-time log events
objective: See how a new log reaches every connected client instantly, without polling.

body.h: Why not just poll every few seconds
body.p: Polling means every client repeatedly asks 'anything new?' even when nothing changed. A socket connection lets the server push the moment something happens.
logRoutes.ts used to import io directly from server.ts, while server.ts imported logRoutes.ts — a circular import that broke at startup. Both now import a shared instance from socket.ts.

quiz.q: What was the original circular import bug?
options: Two files exporting the same name
logRoutes.ts imported io from server.ts, while server.ts imported logRoutes.ts
The port was already in use
